hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! scripts/dockit-validate-session.sh --json --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Documentation not up to date. Update docs/llm/HANDOFF.md (Last Updated date) and add an entry to docs/llm/HISTORY.md before ending the session. Run: scripts/dockit-validate-session.sh --human\"}"; fi'

sh -c 'if ! scripts/dockit-validate-session.sh --json --quiet --check handoff-date --check history-entry >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "{\"additionalContext\":\"Reminder: docs/llm/HANDOFF.md and/or docs/llm/HISTORY.md need updating for today.\"}"; fi'

echo '{"systemMessage": "IMPORTANT: Before this session ends, update docs/llm/HANDOFF.md (Last Updated date + status) and add an entry to docs/llm/HISTORY.md. Run scripts/dockit-validate-session.sh --human to check."}'
